title: 4. Thursday: Quiz, Final Edits & Reflection
content:
4. Thursday: Quiz, Final Edits & Reflection
• Readings: Revisit the “Final Editing & Revision” guidelines provided in the lecture.
• Tasks:
• Complete the Quiz (if scheduled for the week).
• Revise your draft based on feedback.
• Reflect on the revision process in a short written reflection (see sample prompt below).

Note: In Weeks 1–5, you are developing and revising your essays. All final submissions are due in Week 6 as part of your Final Portfolio.

⸻

Weekly Checklist Template

Below is a sample checklist you can follow each week:

[Week X]: [Essay Type] Module

Monday: Warm-Up, Prewriting & Discussion
• Read “Readings & Expectations” pages (e.g., Chapters 1–2 on writing process, or selected article on descriptive language).
• Complete Writing Warm-Up assignment.
• Post in the Discussion forum (e.g., “What Does Writing Mean to You?”).
